Meta.Topic: Reading 1.5 Security and the AWS Shared Responsibility Model

Cards.Back: Examples of AWS Services in the Category | AWS Responsibility
Cards.Hint: AWS Cloud Technical Essentials- udacity - research
Tags: reading 1.5 security and the aws shared responsibility model

Cards.Back: Compute services, such as Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud (Amazon EC2) | AWS manages the underlying infrastructure and foundation services.
Cards.Hint: AWS Cloud Technical Essentials- udacity - research
Tags: reading 1.5 security and the aws shared responsibility model

Cards.Back: Services that require less management from the customer, such as Amazon Relational Database Service (Amazon RDS) | AWS manages the underlying infrastructure and foundation services, operating system, and application platform.
Cards.Hint: AWS Cloud Technical Essentials- udacity - research
Tags: reading 1.5 security and the aws shared responsibility model

Cards.Back: Services that require very little management from the customer, such as Amazon Simple Storage Service (Amazon S3) | AWS operates the infrastructure layer, operating system, and platforms, as well as server-side encryption and data protection.
Cards.Hint: AWS Cloud Technical Essentials- udacity - research
Tags: reading 1.5 security and the aws shared responsibility model

Cards.Hint: AWS Cloud Technical Essentials- udacity - research
Tags: reading 1.5 security and the aws shared responsibility model

Cards.Back: AWS manages the infrastructure and foundation services. | You control the operating system and application platform, as well as encrypting, protecting, and managing customer data.
Cards.Hint: AWS Cloud Technical Essentials- udacity - research
Tags: reading 1.5 security and the aws shared responsibility model

Cards.Back: AWS manages the infrastructure and foundation services, operating system, and application platform. | You are responsible for customer data, encrypting that data, and protecting it through network firewalls and backups.
Cards.Hint: AWS Cloud Technical Essentials- udacity - research
Tags: reading 1.5 security and the aws shared responsibility model

Cards.Back: AWS operates the infrastructure layer, operating system, and platforms, as well as server-side encryption and data protection. | You are responsible for managing customer data and protecting it through client-side encryption.
Cards.Hint: AWS Cloud Technical Essentials- udacity - research
Tags: reading 1.5 security and the aws shared responsibility model
